overall.description: A slow cinematic boat ride through a futuristic cyberpunk city canal, showcasing towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The scene features bright daylight mixed with colorful neon signage, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city canal with floating boat

agents.ego_description: moving slowly on a boat through the city canal, approaching the downtown district

entered.detail: murky green water filling the canal between towering buildings
industrial boat with scaffolding and structures moving through the canal
large cyan neon sign with arrow pointing right, mounted on the building facade
tall futuristic glass and steel towers with various advertisements
dense cluster of high-rise buildings with holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide canal cutting through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis. The camera, positioned on a slow-moving boat, advances steadily toward the city center. Bright sunlight illuminates the scene while the 'ORBITAL AIR' neon sign glows prominently on the right building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered canal passage under overhanging structures

events.description: boat moves under overhanging building structures, reducing sky visibility
lighting shifts to mixed as shadows from overhead structures cover the canal

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the canal as the buildings create a canyon-like environment overhead

entered.detail: black sign with white text and arrow, mounted on the right building
cyan holographic sign floating above the canal
yellow neon sign reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP'
large black billboard with white and red 'MARMUR' text spanning the canal
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the canal

segments.scene_description: The boat progresses into a more enclosed section of the canal, passing under elevated walkways and advertising structures. New holographic signs including 'NOKOTA', 'BELOW', and 'EL DORADO' come into view overhead, while the 'MARMUR' billboard spans the canal ahead. The environment becomes increasingly shadowed as the buildings close in overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon with dense advertising

events.description: passing under the large 'MARMUR' overhead billboard structure

agents.ego_description: navigating deeper into the city center surrounded by towering walls of neon and steel

entered.detail: vertical advertising screens on the left building facade
traditional-style wooden structure with red accents attached to the modern tower

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the boat advancing through the most enclosed section of the canal, passing directly under the massive 'MARMUR' billboard. The right side features a distinctive wooden building structure with orange umbrellas, while various holographic advertisements fill the vertical spaces between towers. The scene maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with dense neon signage and towering architecture closing in from both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous boat ride through a futuristic canal that transitions from a wide, sunlit waterway into a dense, shadowed urban canyon. It begins with a steady advance toward the city center under bright sunlight, passing a prominent Orbital Air neon sign on the right. As the boat progresses, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed, moving under elevated walkways and a canopy of holographic signs for Nokota, Below, and El Dorado. The scene then shifts into deeper shadow as the camera glides directly beneath a massive Marmur billboard that spans the canal. Finally, the journey concludes amidst towering architecture and dense neon signage, passing a wooden structure with orange umbrellas as the city walls close in from both sides.
